title: Financial Aid Types
content:
Financial Aid Overview - Types of Aid
Morgan State University

---

TYPES OF FINANCIAL AID

1. GRANTS (Free Money - No Repayment Required)
   - Federal Pell Grant
   - Federal Supplemental Educational Opportunity Grant (FSEOG)
   - Maryland State Grants
   - Institutional Grants

2. SCHOLARSHIPS (Merit and Need-Based)
   - Academic Scholarships
   - Departmental Scholarships
   - External Scholarships
   - Athletic Scholarships

3. LOANS (Must Be Repaid)
   - Federal Direct Subsidized Loans
   - Federal Direct Unsubsidized Loans
   - Federal Direct PLUS Loans (Parents)
   - Private/Alternative Loans

4. WORK-STUDY (Employment)
   - Federal Work-Study Program
   - On-campus and off-campus employment opportunities
